DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Suzanne Rehmani, Esq. (949-202-1424) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Nguyen Anh To through Court Call.
Edward Haas, Esq. (415-352-0980) for Defendant/Moving party STRAMAGLIA LUU LLP.
Jerry Hauser, Esq. (415-306-9567) for Defendant/Moving party Nguyen Luu.

The Court announces the tentative ruling on all 3 motions. The Court will not issue a ruling, the facts seem to be the same, the Probate Department needs to make a determination. Plaintiff ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NGUYEN LUU DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. This action is stayed pending the resolution of Probate matter PTR-16-299661. The facts asserted in these actions are almost identical. (Compare SAC paragraph 5 and probate Petition paragraph 10). The liability in this action is premised on the validity of the amendment in light of lack of capacity allegations. Per Probate Code 17200(b)(3) determination of validity of the trust provisions is an internal affair of the trust. After the Probate matter is resolved Plaintiff shall amend her complaint to reflect the Probate Court findings.Order is signed for all 3 motions in Open Court.
